name: Rehmannia Glutinosa
summary: Rehmannia glutinosa contains Catalpol and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
description: Rehmannia glutinosa contains Catalpol and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: significant kidney disease or unstable electrolytes
interactions: Potential interaction concern with antidiabetic medicines
use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Progress of research into the pharmacological effect and clinical application of the traditional Chinese medicine Rehmanniae Radix
Rehmannia glutinosa Libosch and Cornus officinalis Sieb herb couple ameliorates renal interstitial fibrosis in CKD rats by inhibiting the TGF-β1/MAPK signaling pathway
Extraction, structure and bioactivities of polysaccharides from Rehmannia glutinosa: A review
